footer.tagline: A warm and modern place for meaningful Serbian language learning.

hero.title: Language, culture and speaking confidence.
hero.subtitle: Expert-led programs with warm guidance for confident Serbian language growth.

home.programsTitle: Programs tailored to each child and pace
home.programsDescription: Authoritative pedagogy with a warm touch: clear structure, consistency and caring guidance.
home.bookingTitle: Sign up for a single class or full semester
home.bookingDescription: Simple signup flow with no parent account required.
home.blogDescription: Balanced content: educational guidance plus stories from everyday life at Kutak.

about.title: About
about.intro: Kutak was founded to give children growing up in New York and the surrounding area a place to learn the language, build friendships and stay connected to the culture of their Balkan roots.

1.title: Language in community
1.text: We believe language and culture are best practiced in a group, through conversation, play and shared experience.

2.title: Belonging and identity
2.text: Kutak helps children build a natural relationship with the language, culture and family roots they inherit.

3.title: Families that connect
3.text: We want Kutak to bring families together so children can grow together and stay motivated to speak our language while growing up in New York.

programs.title: Programs
programs.intro: Autumn 2026 programs are organized by age, with a clear Saturday schedule and steady family support.

calendar.title: Add to calendar
calendar.description: Choose how you'd like to add this class to your calendar:

booking.title: Sign up for a class or semester
booking.intro: Complete the form and we will send the next steps for waiver paperwork and seat confirmation.
booking.validityNotice: A sign-up becomes valid only after a signed waiver and recorded payment. Online payment through the website is not enabled yet.

form.programCardsHelp: Choose one program for the selected age group.
form.programCardsHelpAuto: Choose one program from the groups automatically filtered by the entered age.
form.programCardsAwaitingAge: Enter your child's age to automatically show matching groups and programs.
form.noProgramsForAgeGroup: No programs are currently available for this age group.
form.closestProgramsShown: Closest programs for the entered age are now shown.
form.ageRecommendationFound: For age {age}, the closest match is: {program}.
form.ageRecommendationNone: There is no direct age match right now. You can choose the closest program by level.
form.ageRecommendationInvalid: Enter a numeric age (e.g. 5 or 5.5) to get a recommendation.
form.typeHelpSingle: Single class sign-up applies only to the selected class date.
form.typeHelpSemester: Semester sign-up follows the recurring Saturday schedule. After payment is confirmed, we send the full semester calendar.
form.newsletterOptIn: I also want to subscribe to the newsletter (booking emails remain separate from the newsletter list).
form.success: Sign-up submitted. Your seat is held only after a signed waiver and recorded payment.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

blog.title: Blog
blog.intro: Expert parent guidance and stories from Kutak. Every new post is automatically sent to newsletter subscribers.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: We are happy to help with program recommendations and scheduling.
contact.visitText: Classes are available online and in person by arrangement.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get practical tips and enrollment updates once a month.
newsletter.success: You are subscribed to the newsletter.
newsletter.error: Subscription failed. Please try again later.

newsletterPage.title: Newsletter
newsletterPage.intro: A monthly email with practical parent tips and enrollment updates.

items.1: Short, actionable ideas for supporting language at home.
items.3: Notifications about new blog posts and workshops.

newsletterPage.separationNote: Note: an email used in booking is not automatically added to the newsletter list unless the parent explicitly opts in.

careers.title: We are hiring teachers
careers.intro: We are open to full-time and part-time collaboration with educators who enjoy working with children.

benefits.1: Clear pedagogy framework and support in planning activities.
benefits.2: Flexible options: full-time or occasional engagement.
benefits.3: A warm family community and focus on quality language growth.

form.cvLaterNotice: A CV is not required at this stage. If we contact you, you can provide it later.
form.cvHint: PDF, DOC, or DOCX up to 10 MB.
form.cvInvalidType: The CV must be a PDF, DOC, or DOCX file.
form.cvTooLarge: The CV must be 10 MB or smaller.
form.required: Please fill in all required fields.
form.success: Application submitted successfully. We will contact you soon.
form.error: Application failed to submit. Please try again.
